title: Eternal Edge
description: Turn Minecraft into something you can enjoy for eternal with the help of mods and packs to enhance Minecraft. Focuses on Quality of Life, Adventures, Performance, and Visual.
body:
This modpack aim to turn Minecraft into something you can enjoy for eternal with the help of mods and packs to enhance Minecraft. Focuses on Quality of Life, Adventures, Performance, and Visual.

## How to Update This pack give default mod settings if you don't have `option.txt`, `shaderpacks/.txt`, or `config/`. If you already have it, this pack respects your options and not override them. If you want to get the default option between updates, delete your `option.txt`, `shaderpacks/.txt`, and `config/` first before updates. You can use your options and update though, but please see the changelog or commit history to see what changed so you can adapt if the options changed. ## Mods Used not from Modrinth - [Vanilla Tweaks Resource Pack](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#uePYcq) - [Just Enough Effect Descriptions (JEED)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-effect-descriptions-jeed) - [EMI Trades (fork)](https://github.com/quinn-semele/EMITrades)
